replies.msg:
《尋求國際援手》

有網友寫咗封email 去國際刑事法院 International Criminal Court
網址：https://www.icc-cpi.int/Pages/Main.aspx
電郵：otp.informationdesk@icc-cpi.int
要求調查及控告香港警察， 請考慮一齊send！
請將內文copy，最後署名於「XXX」位置

（歡迎修改及轉載）

Request for investigation and prosecution of the HONG KONG POLICE FORCE

Dear Sirs,

I would like to report that during the past few months, there were frequent demonstrations in Hong Kong by the local citizens, which were initiated to object the Extradition Bill proposed by the Hong Kong Government.

During the demonstrations, the Hong Kong Police used unreasonable brutal forces/violence to disperse and arrest the demonstrators, including physical attacks, tear gas and plastic bullets.

As identified and verified by the demonstrators, tear gas used by the Hong Kong Police were well past the Expiry date and we understand that expired tear gas is actually toxic or harmful to health.

The Hong Kong SAR government refused and keep on refusing to form an independent investigation committee to investigate the current turmoil as well as the seemingly unlawful acts done by the police force.

In this regard, I would like to seek your assistance to instigate an investigation into the unlawful enforcement of the Hong Kong Police, including the use of expired tear gas.

Thank you for your kind attention. I hope by your international impartial status as well as the connection with the UN, you can help us to stop the violence and offenses being done by the HK Police, and bring true justice to us.

Regards,

XXX
A Hong Kong citizen

replies.msg:
一人一Post狂洗連登 [時事台]
唔該你出一份力，肯出post，聽日就係人都知入機場


標題：「警察還眼」明天1PM全民入機場 百萬人塞爆機場

無時間文宣
見POST者，自行Copy開新Post，要連登全部都係呢個Post
TG群組，不停轉發出去，勢要討回雙眼，嬲到火屎呀


812起 1PM，有人性既你立刻罷工，百萬人進入機場，咩都唔做，勢要討回雙眼
機場因為100萬人係機場而暫停運作，不是們的責任，是因為機場不夠大
圍到出青馬，都全條橋唔夠闊

統一口號，兩句，要入健力士，等歷史知道
「黑警還眼」
「五大訴求，缺一不可」

黑警聽住：
一係你就入機場殺哂所有人
一係你就還返隻眼出黎
否則百萬人不離開機場

不沖禁區，不沖跑道
不沖禁區，不沖跑道
不沖禁區，不沖跑道
百萬人入機場，機場自然停
百萬人入機場，機場自然停
百萬人入機場，機場自然停


大群好多人入緊：https://t.me/airport730
睇消息去實時Channel: https://t.me/hk730air
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
不要說推
試著說812機場見
